
 
 
## *************adam-bulk-20*************** ##
 
 
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
fig = plt.figure()
ax = fig.add_subplot(111, projection='3d')
p = 0.2
SNR = 15
N = 20
f = 10
initial_pos = np.array([[90.29602813720703, 104.2513656616211, 13.988544464111328], [197.00796508789062, -127.60455322265625, -111.843994140625], [542.302734375, -340.3190002441406, 141.79931640625], [361.49072265625, -120.52420806884766, 201.99118041992188], [378.6757507324219, 394.4860534667969, -155.39852905273438], [467.6773376464844, -432.24835205078125, -1.0973095893859863], [396.38970947265625, 151.2722625732422, 2.7087926864624023], [537.5, -347.2525939941406, -126.93487548828125], [257.3025817871094, -26.010095596313477, 164.46766662597656], [149.57154846191406, -160.24851989746094, 79.1974868774414], [291.3225402832031, 175.12477111816406, 49.08702087402344], [-356.77874755859375, 203.75164794921875, 35.58719253540039], [232.1447296142578, 0.3673413395881653, -144.40554809570312], [388.4818420410156, 104.61653900146484, -84.4526596069336], [683.8222045898438, 210.40948486328125, 182.23345947265625], [54.061187744140625, 100.05785369873047, 206.61636352539062], [604.6795654296875, 77.07923126220703, 15.042203903198242], [527.6689453125, -353.7334899902344, -3.8590211868286133], [454.9211120605469, 159.59765625, 168.78016662597656], [376.5785827636719, 19.344552993774414, 64.81619262695312]])
optimizer_options = {"learning rate": 1.0}
Energy = 0.2537941038608551
e2 = 64.12*np.array([0.5,np.sqrt(3)/2,0])
e1 = 64.12*np.array([1,0,0])
e3 = 536.35*np.array([0.5,np.sqrt(3)/2,0])
e4 = 536.35*np.array([1,0,0])
FinalState20 = np.array([[107.86751556396484, 144.43629455566406, 29.432453155517578], [118.32585144042969, -75.32327270507812, -161.4530487060547], [593.782470703125, -309.36407470703125, 118.89606475830078], [227.00057983398438, -237.9071044921875, 104.26988220214844], [466.2011413574219, 387.8939514160156, -99.33983612060547], [587.3815307617188, -324.79315185546875, 0.518762469291687], [485.1487731933594, 276.14837646484375, 4.824861526489258], [603.5245361328125, -299.2020263671875, -123.93465423583984], [101.01725769042969, -104.01164245605469, 36.62947463989258], [226.7191162109375, -259.3404541015625, -92.1803970336914], [327.5760803222656, 147.4324188232422, 0.6133440732955933], [-284.2579040527344, 253.05857849121094, 10.375566482543945], [153.54019165039062, 94.57872772216797, -146.41903686523438], [576.597900390625, 225.61483764648438, -91.41688537597656], [458.07958984375, 387.68328857421875, 98.05718994140625], [155.64308166503906, 60.40185546875, 163.14073181152344], [569.286865234375, 229.05601501464844, 103.19694519042969], [646.7439575195312, -250.87905883789062, 4.973557949066162], [312.438720703125, -53.494083404541016, 111.0411148071289], [310.85797119140625, -56.22676086425781, -108.4183578491211]])
FinalState20 = FinalState20.reshape(N,3)
ax.scatter(FinalState20[:,0],FinalState20[:,1],FinalState20[:,2],c='g', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e1[0],e1[1],e1[2],c='r', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e2[0],e2[1],e2[2],c='r', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e3[0],e3[1],e3[2],c='r', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e4[0],e4[1],e4[2],c='r', marker='o')
plt.plot([0,e4[0]], [0,e4[1]], '--', c='k')
plt.plot([0, e3[0]], [0, e3[1]], '--', c = 'k')
plt.show()
plt.xlabel('x')
plt.ylabel('y')
ax.set_zlabel('z')
ax.set_title('Energie='+str(np.round(Energy,4)))
